---
applyTo: '**'
---
1. Create a clear hero section
   - Include the name “Polarity Productions”
   - Short explanation of what this site is (tools, experiments, utilities)
   - Reference that it is built by Polarity
   - Include primary links to:
     - YouTube
     - Blog (polarity.me)
     - Patreon / Support

2. Design a visual tool overview section
   - Use cards / tiles / modules (not a text list)
   - Each tile represents one tool or project
   - Each tile contains:
     - Tool name
     - Short one-line description
     - Clickable link
   - Feature 3–6 main tools first
   - Optionally group smaller tools under “More tools” or “Experiments”

3. Add a short context section
   - Explain that these tools are things the creator actually uses
   - Mention that some projects are experimental
   - Set expectations: tools may evolve, change, or disappear

4. Create a simple footer
   - Link to:
     - https://polarity.me (main site / blog)
     - YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/@PolarityMusic)
     - Patreon (https://www.patreon.com/polarity_music)
     - GitHub (https://github.com/polarity)
   - Legal / imprint placeholder

5. Ensure fast scannability
   - The page should be understandable within 10 seconds
   - No long paragraphs
   - Prioritize visual hierarchy and clarity
